sources.note: Marriage to Eva Ferguson, Mar 30, 1893, Baltimore MD

notes: Born in Kinsale, VA — the same town where his grandfather John Gemeny II built Pleasant View. Father Andrew Gemeny (1829-1882) died when Edgar was 19 in Royal Oak, Talbot County, MD. Mother Margaret Elnora 'Nora' Denny (1837-1929) lived to age 92, dying at Swain Farm, Talbot MD. Married Eva Ferguson on March 30, 1893 in Baltimore. Six children: Esther L. (1894-1967), Andrew 'Pop' (1896-1989), Edgar Denny (1899-1988), Eva (1903-1974), Ferguson (1909-2009), Ruth (1910-1910). Siblings: Stephen Denny Gemeny (1859-1935), Lillie May (1866-1867), Wilbur Fisk (1869-1870), Maria Elnora (1875-). Lived in Royal Oak, Washington DC, Brandywine MD, and Baltimore. Died September 25, 1939 at age 76. Buried in Brandywine, MD.
